final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand promotional poster for RAN QIU with a warm autumnal, poetic, and serene visual experience.

Style/medium: needs an Eastern-aesthetic minimalist poster aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs generous negative space with shallow depth-of-field treatment — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include the brand wordmark "RAN QIU" integrated with natural autumnal elements
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere with natural elements — exact scene is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a golden-hour, warm and healing atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must use #8B3A1E (deep autumn brick-red), #E8DCCB (cream beige), #D4A574 (golden brown) as the core palette
Materials/textures: needs a natural, organic surface quality — exact texture treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must preserve brand tonal qualities: Eastern aesthetics, minimalism, natural poetry, warmth
Avoid:
